title: NOAA Weather Systems and Patterns
description: A NOAA source card about weather systems, atmospheric patterns, and forecasting concepts.
license: U.S. Government Work / item-level rights vary

pages.text: NOAA weather systems resources explain pressure, air masses, fronts, storms, atmospheric circulation, and forecasting patterns.
Use this source to support students reading weather maps, explaining cause and effect, and connecting local weather to larger atmospheric systems.
NOAA materials are generally U.S. government work, but resource collections may link to partners or offsite materials. Check item-level rights before mirroring linked resources.
